content.title: Mid-Level Python Backend Engineer
must_haves: Django or FastAPI web framework experience
PostgreSQL relational database design and query optimization
Docker containerization for local and CI environments
responsibilities: Build and maintain backend services powering the analytics platform
Design normalized PostgreSQL schemas and optimize slow queries
Expose and document REST endpoints consumed by the web client
Containerize services and keep the CI pipeline green
content.raw_text_excerpt: We are hiring a mid-level Python backend engineer to join our analytics team. You will work with Django/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and Docker to ship reliable services.
